https://ref.openepcis.io/extensions/comm._comment: OpenEPCIS DPP Core Vocabulary v0.9.7, generated from extensions/common/core/ontology/dpp-core.ttl. Do not edit by hand; re-run `pnpm run build:context` and edit extensions/common/core/context/.context-overrides.json for non-derivable hints.

_comment: EN 18223:2026 operational data-dictionary BASE context for OpenEPCIS Digital Product Passports.
§5.2.2: the operational serialization keys by elementId and externalises the
dictionaryReference/valueDataType to a data dictionary — this file is that dictionary for the
cross-cutting DPP core (envelope + gs1:/oec: shared terms). Each regulation module publishes its
own operational context (e.g. eu/battery/battery-operational-context.jsonld) that layers this base
plus that module's vocabulary, so a battery passport resolves the battery terms without dragging in
textile/electronics. Attaching the applicable operational context to the compact GS1 master-data
body (the resolver POST /products payload) makes it self-describing JSON-LD that expands to the RDF.
Bare (unprefixed) term aliases for the dpp-core vocabulary.
Included only by the operational contexts, so bare terms resolve under an
operational @context but the standard context requires proper prefixing.

EN 18223:2026 operational context for the EU Battery Regulation 2023/1542 module.
DPP operational base + this module's standard vocabulary + its bare-alias shortcut layer,
so the compact master-data body of a product in this regulation becomes self-describing JSON-LD.

https://ref.openepcis.io/extensions/eu/b._comment: OpenEPCIS Battery Vocabulary v0.9.7, generated from extensions/eu/battery/ontology/battery.ttl. Do not edit by hand; re-run `pnpm run build:context` and edit extensions/eu/battery/context/.context-overrides.json for non-derivable hints.

This context interprets incoming BatteryPass documents as OpenEPCIS/GS1 terms (external key -> eubat:/oec:/gs1:). The two BatteryPass sources are referenced separately. (1) samm-* = the BatteryPass Consortium SAMM aspect models (github.com/batterypass), real versions 1.2.0 (Performance 1.2.1), matching battery.ttl. (2) bpr: = the GEFEG BatteryPass-Ready longlist v1.3 (thebatterypass.eu), which publishes no RDF IRIs, so this is an OpenEPCIS-hosted reference namespace for its longlist-only attributes (DPP-information group #1-#4). No SAMM 1.3.0 / DPPInformation submodel exists.
